rows.label: tev000593_MSG0001
rows.name: Evening, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0002
rows.name: It's rare to see you this late at night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0007
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ask Gwin if he and Mythos are
"enjoying" the nightlife.

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0009
rows.name: Appreciate

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thank Gwin and Mythos
for patrolling so late.

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0003
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0004
rows.name:
Tell Gwin and Mythos to
stay out of trouble.

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0005
rows.name:
Whoa, easy! No need for
the seedy air quotes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0006
rows.name:
We're just taking a break between
some really rough missions, is all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0011
rows.name:
Aw, that's nice of you to say, but we
aren't actually on duty right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0012
rows.name:
Seriously? Me and Mythos? Do we really
look like we're getting into trouble?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't think we have so much as
a jaywalking ticket between us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0014
rows.name:
We just like to get together here and
talk when we both have a night off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0015
rows.name:
Actually, we were just reminiscing
about our childhood dreams.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0016
rows.name:
Mythos wanted to be a race car
driver. Still does, in fact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0017
rows.name:
He's even looking to buy a sports car
just so he can speed around NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0018
rows.name:
I told him if he'd quit the Companion and join
one of the Unions that leaves the city, he
could go four- wheeling around the plains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0019
rows.name:
But he said he's not the rally-car type—it's
gotta be a sports car or nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0020
rows.name:
So what did you want to be
when you were a kid, [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_JNK0010
rows.name: Deflect

rows.label: tev000593_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Gwin about his childhood dream instead.

rows.label: tev000593_JNK0020
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: tev000593_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Gwin it's too embarrassing to share.

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0021
rows.name: ...Me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0022
rows.name:
To be honest, I couldn't see anything
beyond the here and now when I was a kid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0023
rows.name:
I had all sorts of hobbies and stuff,
but never really had a strong desire
to...you know. BE anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0024
rows.name:
But when I met Leon—that's Lieutenant
Iriina's brother— he inspired me to
start making goals for the future.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0025
rows.name:
Don't know that I'd call any
of them "dreams," though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0026
rows.name:
Wow, you're that ashamed of
it? It must be terrible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000593_MSG0027
rows.name:
I'm dying to know, but if you don't
want to talk about it, I'll let it go.[ST:wait ]
